sample_posts.text: https://x.com/jerryhuang01/status/2074552435436335537

tweet.text:
Everyone in the Bay is building a robot company. Almost nobody is talking about the real bottleneck.

After 2 years running the Robotics Center of Silicon Valley, seeing hundreds of frontier labs and stealth startups, one pattern is undeniable:
The blocker isn't model capability. It’s the sim-to-real loop. 

1. Simulation ≠ Hardware Reality A VLA trained in Isaac Sim or MuJoCo hits a wall when it encounters real-world actuator limits: thermal throttling, joint backlash, and sensor drift. Even two units of the exact same robot model have completely different dynamics.
2. Teleop data is inherent

Binance CEO Richard Teng Says 70% of EU User Withdrawals Went to Self-Hosted Wallets While Only 30% Flowed to Mica Regulated Platforms.
Source:
https://x.com/coinbureau/status/2075275037029040199

tweet.text:
🔥BINANCE CEO: 70% OF BINANCE EU USERS FLEE TO SELF-HOSTED WALLETS AFTER MICA

Richard Teng says of users who withdrew from Binance after MiCA took effect, 70% of those funds went to self-hosted wallets while only 30% flowed to regulated platforms.

“Once it goes into a self-hosted wallet, the risks actually amplify. You don’t have proper AML and KYC controls over those.”

trending_topics.context: 2 posts, 1.94x baseline rate — mentioning Relay Protocol, Robinhood Chain

sample_posts.text:
Relay Warns of Scam Tokens on Robinhood Chain
> “Scam tokens designed to remove themselves after purchase. If you bought one, the funds you spent are unfortunately gone.”
Source:
https://x.com/RelayProtocol/status/2075244605633917320

tweet.text:
We’re aware of reports of tokens disappearing from wallets after purchase on Robinhood Chain.

There’s been an increase in scam tokens designed to remove themselves after purchase. If you bought one, the funds you spent are unfortunately gone. We’re blocking these tokens as they show up and verifying safe ones.

Importantly, this is not a wallet compromise. Your private keys and other balances are untouched — nothing beyond the scam token purchase itself is at risk.

Reminder: anyone can list a token. Stick to tokens verified by us or another trusted source.

If you’ve been affected, reach out

tweet.text:
MIP-021: A Rules-Based Buyback That Scales With Revenue

It proposes a rules-based buyback that scales with revenue: 10% of monthly revenue under $1.5M, 20% from $1.5M–$2M, and 30% above $2M, used to buy back SYRUP, with every buyback posted publicly.

Read it below and share feedback ahead of the vote (live July 13).

sample_posts.text:
Jito Partners With Privy to Launch “Fullsend”
> Fullsend is a service built to ensure reliable, institutional-grade transaction landing for all Solana transactions via Privy.
> “By routing through FullSend by default since January, inclusion latency dropped to as low as 50ms for users with 99.999% landing reliability”.
Source:
https://x.com/jito_sol/status/2075249175046856890

tweet.text:
We're proud to partner with @privy_io in launching Fullsend, a service built to ensure reliable, institutional-grade transaction landing for all Solana transactions via Privy.

By routing through FullSend by default since January, inclusion latency dropped to as low as 50ms for users with 99.999% landing reliability, while still fulfilling Best Execution and other obligations.

tweet.text:
Offchain Labs Co-Founder: 10% of Fees From Robinhood Chain and Other Arbitrum L2s Will Go to Arbitrum Ecosystem

Arbitrum developer Offchain Labs co-founder Steven Goldfeder said 10% of fees collected on Robinhood Chain and other Arbitrum L2s will go to the Arbitrum ecosystem, with 8% going to the tokenholder-controlled treasury and 2% funding development. 100% of fees collected on Arbitrum One will go to the Arbitrum treasury. Robinhood Chain is now live in Robinhood Wallet, allowing users to bridge from Solana, Ethereum, Arbitrum and other networks to Robinhood Chain and make swaps within th

trending_topics.context: 5 posts, 1.92x baseline rate — mentioning Hyperliquid, Binance

sample_posts.text: https://x.com/jerryhuang01/status/2074552435436335537

tweet.text:
Everyone in the Bay is building a robot company. Almost nobody is talking about the real bottleneck.

After 2 years running the Robotics Center of Silicon Valley, seeing hundreds of frontier labs and stealth startups, one pattern is undeniable:
The blocker isn't model capability. It’s the sim-to-real loop. 

1. Simulation ≠ Hardware Reality A VLA trained in Isaac Sim or MuJoCo hits a wall when it encounters real-world actuator limits: thermal throttling, joint backlash, and sensor drift. Even two units of the exact same robot model have completely different dynamics.
2. Teleop data is inherent

sample_posts.text:
HPC and Phantom Ask the CFTC to Make Room for Onchain Market Infrastructure
> Hyperliquid Policy Center and Phantom urged the CFTC to distinguish infrastructure developers from regulated financial intermediaries, arguing that publishing onchain software and non-custodial wallets should not require registration.
Source:
https://x.com/HyperliquidPC/status/2075234343832678602

Binance CEO Richard Teng Says 70% of EU User Withdrawals Went to Self-Hosted Wallets While Only 30% Flowed to Mica Regulated Platforms.
Source:
https://x.com/coinbureau/status/2075275037029040199

tweet.text:
🔥BINANCE CEO: 70% OF BINANCE EU USERS FLEE TO SELF-HOSTED WALLETS AFTER MICA

Richard Teng says of users who withdrew from Binance after MiCA took effect, 70% of those funds went to self-hosted wallets while only 30% flowed to regulated platforms.

“Once it goes into a self-hosted wallet, the risks actually amplify. You don’t have proper AML and KYC controls over those.”

tweet.text:
MIP-021: A Rules-Based Buyback That Scales With Revenue

It proposes a rules-based buyback that scales with revenue: 10% of monthly revenue under $1.5M, 20% from $1.5M–$2M, and 30% above $2M, used to buy back SYRUP, with every buyback posted publicly.

Read it below and share feedback ahead of the vote (live July 13).

sample_posts.text:
Jito Partners With Privy to Launch “Fullsend”
> Fullsend is a service built to ensure reliable, institutional-grade transaction landing for all Solana transactions via Privy.
> “By routing through FullSend by default since January, inclusion latency dropped to as low as 50ms for users with 99.999% landing reliability”.
Source:
https://x.com/jito_sol/status/2075249175046856890

tweet.text:
We're proud to partner with @privy_io in launching Fullsend, a service built to ensure reliable, institutional-grade transaction landing for all Solana transactions via Privy.

By routing through FullSend by default since January, inclusion latency dropped to as low as 50ms for users with 99.999% landing reliability, while still fulfilling Best Execution and other obligations.

convergence.context: 7 posts across 3 channels (shoalresearch, ahboyashreads, cookiesreads) — mentioning Gauntlet Networks, SBI Holdings, Ollama, Paradigm

sample_posts.text: https://x.com/jerryhuang01/status/2074552435436335537

tweet.text:
Everyone in the Bay is building a robot company. Almost nobody is talking about the real bottleneck.

After 2 years running the Robotics Center of Silicon Valley, seeing hundreds of frontier labs and stealth startups, one pattern is undeniable:
The blocker isn't model capability. It’s the sim-to-real loop. 

1. Simulation ≠ Hardware Reality A VLA trained in Isaac Sim or MuJoCo hits a wall when it encounters real-world actuator limits: thermal throttling, joint backlash, and sensor drift. Even two units of the exact same robot model have completely different dynamics.
2. Teleop data is inherent

sample_posts.text: https://x.com/BessemerVP/status/2074913742354342252

tweet.text: Five frontiers defining the next wave of investments in AI infrastructure, each solving a structural limit that model scaling alone can't fix 🧵

Gauntlet Closes $125 Million Series C Led by SBI Holdings
> “The capital will support building our infra across traditional capital markets, expanding stablecoin coverage, and accelerating new onchain offerings.”
Source:
https://x.com/gauntlet_xyz/status/2075203815582900638

tweet.text:
We've closed a $125M Series C led by SBI Holdings.

The capital will support building our infrastructure across traditional capital markets, expanding stablecoin coverage, and accelerating new onchain offerings.

As institutions move onchain, we're providing the quantitative guardrails to scale their capital deployment.

Learn more: https://www.gauntlet.xyz/resources/gauntlet-closes-125-million-series-c

tweet.text:
Scoop: Mercor is discussing a new fundraise at a ~$20 billion valuation.

The AI training startup has received at least one term sheet at that level, sources tell us, which would double its last valuation.
